title: Misatos final lines Changing the carpet
display_title: Misatos final lines Changing the carpet
wikitext:
[]: Misato's final lines (Changing the carpet)             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 26, 2007 10:00 pm What exactly does one of Misato's final lines, "If I'd known it would have ended up like, I would have changed the carpet like Asuka suggested.", mean? :? Is that some type of cultural reference that I'm not aware of, or just simply referencing something that didn't happen "on-camera", eg, the three roomates sitting around one day and Asuka mentions how much the color of their carpet (at home, I'm assuming?) sucks? Yes, I know this isn't that important, but it's been bugging me for awhile. And is it safe to assume that Misato did see a Rei-appeartiation of Kaji (just that we the audience didn't seem him, akin to Asuka's getting tanged) before dying/being tanged, as her final words before her death state? "Kaji-kun...I did the right thing, right?" (And I'm guessing her farewell kiss and promise of "doing the rest when Shinji returns" was simply her way of making him get his ass in gear--"...I did the right thing"--but maybe what we see in 23 and 25 is implying she does have feelings for the boy??)

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jan 26, 2007 10:25 pm I imagine she is just finding it funny that she is regretting something like that. I don't think it is a cultural reference. "We'll do the rest when you get back". This may be to give Shinji some form of hope (i.e.- everything will be alright) and assure him that she does care about him. I actually hadn't thought of Kaji appearing before Misato, but it is feasible.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Fri Jan 26, 2007 11:14 pm I think when she said "carpet" it was a metaphor for a certain part of her anatomy the is known to have hair around it...thats just my speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Sat Jan 27, 2007 12:07 am so...Asuka told Misato to change her pubic hair? I don't think so.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 27, 2007 12:09 am Probably referring to an off-screen chat. We all know Asuka loves to bitch. Remember Misato has lost a lot of blood, and is probably in shock. It's no real surprise she isn't really making sense here.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sat Jan 27, 2007 1:17 am You wernt there so you dont know.After all it was just some perverted humor on my part.Dont concern yourself.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Jan 27, 2007 2:14 am you know they do that in anime...whenever someone is about to die...they say something like "Im so glad i got see you one last time..." or "I should've shared my ramen with Hachi"...or "tell my wife Im sorry...*sigh*...Aya will be cross with me..." its just a corny anime line...

[]: Re: Misato's final lines (Changing the carpet)             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 27, 2007 11:30 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: What exactly does one of Misato's final lines, "If I'd known it would have ended up like, I would have changed the carpet like Asuka suggested.", mean? :?

[]: Re: Misato's final lines (Changing the carpet)             Quote Post by Jay911 » Sat Jan 27, 2007 6:11 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: What exactly does one of Misato's final lines, "If I'd known it would have ended up like, I would have changed the carpet like Asuka suggested.", mean? :?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jan 27, 2007 6:46 pm I hadn't thought of Kaji appearing before her as she's dying. It's quite an interesting idea...

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Sun Jan 28, 2007 9:11 pm pen-pen probably crapped on it one too many times.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Jan 31, 2007 3:15 pm Maybe Asuka suggested "changing the carpet" while Shinji was dealing with his "thermal expansion" issue. ;) Anyway, I could imagine Kaji appearing to Misato during tangification, but I wouldn't say that he'd be the obvious choice. Misato also cared deeply about her father (even though she thought she hated him for a long time), and of course Shinji. But then again, it's not entirely relevant to the story, which may be why they left it up for speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 31, 2007 3:32 pm But then again, it's not entirely relevant to the story, which may be why they left it up for speculation.

[]: Re: Misato's final lines (Changing the carpet)             Quote Post by Res Novae » Wed Jan 31, 2007 4:12 pm I always thought it was just a reference to an 'off-camera' critique of the lodgings by Asuka. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 31, 2007 4:24 pm Timstuff wrote: Anyway, I could imagine Kaji appearing to Misato during tangification, but I wouldn't say that he'd be the obvious choice. Misato also cared deeply about her father (even though she thought she hated him for a long time), and of course Shinji. But then again, it's not entirely relevant to the story, which may be why they left it up for speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 31, 2007 6:45 pm BEFORE she's tanged and "blown in two"; this: Misato's last words wrote: I should have changed the carpet like Asuka suggested... ...right, Pen-Pen? Kaji, I did the right thing, didn't I?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Jan 31, 2007 6:54 pm Did Asuka ever say anything about carpets?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 31, 2007 6:57 pm Not that I'm aware of, which is why I personally, and a few others are assuming it was some off-camera "I'm bitching about this because I like to bitch" comment.

[]:             Quote Post by jakewashere » Wed Jan 31, 2007 7:04 pm Plus there's the possible meaning of "I wish I'd put a red carpet in here so the bloodstains wouldn't show..."

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 31, 2007 7:44 pm Not that it matters, since in a mere scant seconds, your body will be blown to bits only to be again in once piece when you're shown tanged! ^^; "Quantam magic", you know.
